name: peek-carousel
title: Peek Carousel
author: Parable
description: An Apple-style peek carousel where the active slide springs to center at full scale while the previous/next slides peek in at the edges, scaled to ~0.86 and dimmed; navigate by arrows, dots, drag (with velocity-projected snap), or wheel. Under prefers-reduced-motion it degrades to a plain CSS scroll-snap scroller with no scaling or inertia, keeping the same arrows, dots, keyboard, and labelling.
